# Julien Mann

> Julien Mann is a photographer, web developer, and cégep student based in Montréal, Québec. This site is his personal portfolio and contact page.

Julien works at the intersection of sciences, literature, and the arts. Outside academics he climbs, mountain bikes, sails, and mountaineers — disciplines he credits for the focus and resilience he brings to photography, filmmaking, and web development.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://julienmann.ca/): About, current projects, and contact form.
- [Photography](https://creative.julienmann.ca): Portfolio of portrait, event, and commercial photography.
- [Web Development](https://dev.julienmann.ca): Web development work and projects.

## Contact

- Contact form: https://julienmann.ca/#contact (messages answered personally, usually within 24 hours).
